# Pull Request

## Summary

## Verification

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `py -3.14 -m pytest`
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I did not include tokens or private data
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactoring
